issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' (checking if Leader is a specific card), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (which checks for cards on the board)
Action should be 'AttachDon' (attach/set DON!! cards as active), not 'GiveDon' (which adds DON!! to pool)

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] If your Leader is [Kouzuki Oden], set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active.
